User.title: UserProfile
User.description: User profile with avatar, custom name and description.

email.description: The email address of the agent.

avatar.description: URL or preset logo reference to agent identity graphic.

bio.description: Narrative background bio of the active agent.

joinedAt.description: Date representing when the node registration took place.

Character.title: CharacterCard
Character.description: Gaming character entity with dynamic combat statistics and ownership tracking.

id.description: Unique record identifier inside the grid.

name.description: Name of the hero or villain character.

bio.description: Combat background story and lore details.

ownerEmail.description: Owner credential link if custom minted.

likedBy.description: UIDs or emails of agents who liked this file.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores agent private configurations and profile attributes.

/characters/{characterId}.description: Stores original and custom-minted gaming character vectors.
